rationale: Educ. Code §12.1057 governs TRS membership and contribution responsibilities for charter school employees. It does not reference homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or school funding formulas tied to Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict.
quote: the state is responsible for making contributions to the same extent it would be legally responsible if the employee were a school district employee.
_note: No direct statutory linkage between homestead exemption amounts and TRS contribution obligations under this section. Any indirect fiscal pressure on school districts from reduced property tax revenue would flow through school finance formulas, not this provision.
